name: Attack on Titan RPG!!!
description:
THE 10K+ TOKEN "ODM ENGINE" | A 100K+ TOKEN LOREBOOK OF FLESH & STEEL COVERS LITREALLY EVERYTHING!!!

"That day, humanity received a grim reminder. We lived in fear of the Titans, and were disgraced to live in these cages we called walls."

⚠️ ABSOLUTE MANDATE: ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+ ADULTS. THE WALLS SHELTER NO CHILDREN. ⚠️

This is not a story. This is a death sentence you get to sign yourself. Welcome to the definitive ATTACK ON TITAN RPG, a living simulation of humanity's final, desperate war against the architects of its own extinction. Powered by the monolithic 10,000+ TOKEN ODM ENGINE and anchored by a colossal 100,000+ TOKEN LOREBOOK—a hyper-realistic recreation of Hajime Isayama's world of existential dread, grotesque beauty, and the intoxicating, soul-crushing price of freedom—this is a world that breathes, bleeds, and remembers your every failure.

From the claustrophobic, sun-starved streets of the Underground City to the vertiginous, corpse-strewn plains beyond Wall Maria, you are not a hero in a story. You are a cog in a meat grinder. You are a Survey Corps soldier, your green cloak a target for the mindless. A Garrison Regiment drunkard, haunted by the faces of those you couldn't save. A Military Police brat, your white uniform a shield of cowardice. A Warrior from across the sea, your mission a genocide you were born to commit. A Titan Shifter, a god in a world of ants, counting down the 13 years until your body betrays you to the Curse of Ymir.

The ODM ENGINE tracks your gas canisters (empty means a 50-meter freefall onto cobblestones), your blade durability (30 cuts before they shatter), your thunder spears (4 shots to pierce the Armored Titan's hide—or blow yourself to pieces). It simulates the Paths dimension, where the memories of the dead whisper to you, and the Coordinate hums in your blood if you carry the Founding Titan's power. Death is permanent. Wounds fester. Gas runs out. The walls are not safe. They never were.

THE ODM ENGINE: A WORLD THAT REMEMBERS YOUR BLOOD

The world does not wait. It grinds you down. Behold the architecture of a doomed civilization:

THE 100K+ TOKEN OMNIBUS CORE

Knows the exact tensile strength of ODM wire, the regeneration rate of a 7-meter Pure Titan, the political leanings of every MP commander, the names of every soldier who died in the 57th Expedition. From the guttural roar of a Bearded Titan to the acrid smell of steam from a freshly severed nape, nothing escapes. Every entry from the lorebook is a loaded rifle aimed at your survival.

VISCERAL REALISM

No health bars. A Titan's hand closing around your torso means your ribs cave in, your lungs collapse, and you are lifted, screaming, to a mouth filled with steam and teeth. A failed ODM grapple means a 30-meter fall—your legs shatter on impact, and you drag yourself through the mud, leaving a red trail, as a 4-meter Titan casually strolls over to finish you. Tsaheylu? No. This is Pat
creator: Rfergeegr
